'''tazuwu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:leadout|leadout]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-z-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:leadout|leadout]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tazuwu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæziwith|tæziwith]] || [[word:tæziwij|tæziwij]] || [[word:tæziwish|tæziwish]] || [[word:tæziwi|tæziwi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tazuzuwuth|tazuzuwuth]] || [[word:tazuzuwuj|tazuzuwuj]] || [[word:tazuzuwush|tazuzuwush]] || [[word:tazuzuwu|tazuzuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tazuwuth|tazuwuth]] || [[word:tazuwuj|tazuwuj]] || [[word:tazuwush|tazuwush]] || [[word:tazuwu|tazuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tazufwuth|tazufwuth]] || [[word:tazufwuj|tazufwuj]] || [[word:tazufwush|tazufwush]] || [[word:tazufwuf|tazufwuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tazuwuthu|tazuwuthu]] || [[word:tazuwuju|tazuwuju]] || [[word:tazuwushu|tazuwushu]] || [[word:tazuwuku|tazuwuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tazuwuth|tazuwuth]] || [[word:tazuwuj|tazuwuj]] || [[word:tazuwush|tazuwush]] || [[word:tazuwu|tazuwu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tazuwuthul|tazuwuthul]] || [[word:tazuwujul|tazuwujul]] || [[word:tazuwushul|tazuwushul]] || [[word:tazuwukul|tazuwukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tazuwuthuthu|tazuwuthuthu]] || [[word:tazuwujuju|tazuwujuju]] || [[word:tazuwushushu|tazuwushushu]] || [[word:tazuwuku|tazuwuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tazuwuthun|tazuwuthun]] || [[word:tazuwujun|tazuwujun]] || [[word:tazuwushun|tazuwushun]] || [[word:tazuwukun|tazuwukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tazuwuthuoro|tazuwuthuoro]] || [[word:tazuwujuoro|tazuwujuoro]] || [[word:tazuwushuoro|tazuwushuoro]] || [[word:tazuwukuoro|tazuwukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
